stories.title: ProgressPhotosScreen: Alert.alert errors → toast.error
stories.description:
ProgressPhotosScreen has 4 Alert.alert() calls for network/API errors that should use the app-wide toast system instead. The permission alert (line 362) is intentional and stays.

Replace:
- load() catch: Alert.alert('Erreur', 'Impossible de charger les photos.')
- onRefresh() catch: Alert.alert('Erreur', 'Impossible de charger les photos.')
- handleUploadSave() catch: Alert.alert('Erreur', "Impossible d'envoyer la photo.")
- handleDelete() catch: Alert.alert('Erreur', 'Impossible de supprimer la photo.')

With toast.error() equivalents. Remove Alert import if no longer used.
acceptance: 4 Alert.alert() error calls replaced by toast.error()
Alert.alert('Permission requise', ...) at line ~362 stays untouched

stories.title: ProgressPhotosScreen: haptic feedback on upload/delete success
stories.description:
After a successful photo upload (handleUploadSave) or photo deletion (handleDelete), no haptic feedback is given. Add hapticSuccess() after the successful operation in each function.

- In handleUploadSave(): after `await uploadPhoto(...)`, before `setUploadUri(null)`
- In handleDelete(): after `await deletePhoto(id)`, before `setLightboxIndex(null)`

stories.title: getActivityDescription: extract to utils and dedup
stories.description:
getActivityDescription() and getTypeIcon() are defined locally in ActivityFeedScreen.tsx. GroupDetailScreen.tsx has its own partial version of getActivityDescription() (only handles 'workout_completed').

Extract both functions to utils/activityHelpers.ts and import in both files.

Note: Check the exact type signature of ActivityItem used in each file before extracting. If the types differ, use a type that works for both or define a minimal shared interface.
acceptance: New file utils/activityHelpers.ts exports getActivityDescription and getTypeIcon
ActivityFeedScreen imports from utils/activityHelpers (local functions removed)
GroupDetailScreen imports getActivityDescription from utils/activityHelpers (local function removed)
